data.title: David Sacks: Crypto market structure legislation is fully capable of passing with bipartisan support this year
data.description: David Sacks, the White House director of cryptocurrency and artificial intelligence, said: "After meeting with members of the Senate on Capitol Hill today and having productive talks with key Democratic members, I believe we are fully capable of passing crypto market structure legislation with bipartisan support this year, which will finally bring much-needed regulatory clarity to the cryptocurrency industry and build on the success of the United States Stablecoin Innovation GENIUS Act signed by President Trump earlier this year."

data.title: Bitget CEO Gracy: The consensus in the crypto industry is becoming more conservative, and the current market is in a stage of repair and consolidation
data.description: Bitget CEO Gracy posted on X that after recent conversations with several leading market makers and VCs, the industry consensus is becoming more conservative. She pointed out that the risk-return ratio for retail investors in altcoins is currently extremely poor, and VC funds have largely withdrawn from the Web3 primary market. Only infrastructure projects with real resources, such as stablecoins, RWAs, and payment platforms, still have value, but most of these projects will not issue tokens. She also believes that the DAT bubble is bursting, long-tail projects lack real buying, and recent financing has mostly been in the form of "coin-for-equity" transactions, which generally exposes investors to high risks. Gracy also stated that after the 1011 black swan event, market trading volume dropped by 20%-40%, and many market makers suffered heavy losses. The market is currently in a phase of recovery and consolidation.

data.title: Paxos Introduces Stablecoin Salary Option for Employees
data.description:
According to PANews, Paxos has announced a new feature allowing employees to receive part of their salary in the form of the stablecoin USDG, following an integration partnership with Toku. This integration utilizes existing payroll platforms ADP and Workday, enabling employees to directly receive USDG in their personal wallets. Unlike traditional payroll checks, the settlement for those opting for USDG is immediate, allowing instant access to the stablecoin.

Paxos highlighted in a press release that by adopting USDG for payroll, they offer their team the most direct way to engage with and experience USDG in daily life. As more companies integrate Toku's payroll channels, thousands of employees worldwide will have the opportunity to receive USDG directly at the source of their income.

data.title: OKX now opens MET call auction
data.description: OKX has officially announced the upcoming listing of MET (Meteora) and the conversion of pre-market MET contracts to standard perpetual contracts. Meteora is a decentralized exchange dedicated to providing secure, sustainable, and composable liquidity infrastructure for the Solana ecosystem and the broader DeFi space. The specific schedule is as follows: 1. MET call auction period: 9:00 PM to 10:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 23, 2025. 2. MET/USDT spot trading opening time: 10:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 23, 2025. 3. MET/USDT pre-market contract conversion period: Within three hours of 10:00 PM (UTC+8) on October 23, 2025. As long as the index remains stable during this period, the contract conversion will be completed. 4. MET withdrawals open: October 24, 2025, 1:00 AM (UTC+8)

data.description:
Bitcoin traded 13% below its $126K all-time high as traders say the BTC price could drop to $88K over the next few days if key support levels don’t hold.

data.title: Global hedge‑fund assets hit record $5 trillion as inflows surge
data.description:
The global hedge-fund industry has reached a record $5 trillion in total asset value, as investors pushed massive amounts of money into alternative strategies while funds delivered strong gains. The figure, reported by Hedge Fund Research Inc. (HFR) on Thursday, shows nearly $34 billion in net inflows during the three months through September — the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/global-hedge%e2%80%91fund-assets-record-5-trillion/

data.title: Genius Group, a US-listed company, is issuing a Bitcoin reward of $0.10 per share to eligible shareholders.
data.description: Genius Group Limited (GNS), a US-listed education company, announced a Bitcoin bonus of $0.10 per share to eligible shareholders. Shareholders are required to transfer their shares from their brokerage firm to VStock, the company's designated transfer agent, for book registration and hold them for six months. Currently, 60.3% of the company's shares are book registered.

data.title: Fidelity Digital Assets Expands Support to Solana Token
data.description: According to PANews, Fidelity Digital Assets, a subsidiary of Fidelity Investments, has announced its support for the custody and trading of Solana tokens. This development marks an expansion of the company's digital asset offerings, allowing clients to engage with Solana's growing ecosystem.
